query:
SELECT
            b.id,
            b.owner_id,
            b.title,
            b.description,
            JSONB_AGG(
                JSONB_BUILD_OBJECT(
                    'id', m.id,
                    'user_id', m.user_id,
                    'role', m.role,
                    'username', u.username,
                    'email', u.email
                )
                ORDER BY m.role
            ) AS "members!: Json<Vec<BoardMemberWithUserDb>>"
        FROM boards b
        INNER JOIN board_members m ON b.id = m.board_id
        INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = m.user_id
        WHERE b.id = $1
        GROUP BY b.id, b.owner_id, b.title, b.description
